metadata.name: CrowdSec
metadata.description: Standalone CrowdSec Security Engine deployment for a single Docker host, with host and reverse-proxy log acquisition, optional AppSec exposure, and console or bouncer enrollment placeholders.

items.name: service_name
items.title: Service Name
items.description: Compose service name for CrowdSec.

items.name: container_name
items.title: Container Name
items.description: Container name for CrowdSec.

items.name: image_tag
items.title: Image Tag
items.description: CrowdSec image tag to deploy.

items.name: container_timezone
items.title: Container Timezone
items.description: Timezone used inside the container.

items.name: restart_policy
items.title: Restart Policy
items.description: Policy used for container restart.

items.name: collections_core
items.title: Core Collections
items.description: Space-separated base collections to install on startup.

items.name: collections_extra
items.title: Extra Collections
items.description: Additional space-separated collections to install, for example a reverse-proxy parser.

items.name: host_logs_enabled
items.title: Host Logs
items.description: Ingest host auth and syslog files from `/var/log`.

items.name: docker_logs_enabled
items.title: Docker Logs
items.description: Read logs from a matching Docker container through the Docker socket.

items.name: docker_group_id
items.title: Docker Group ID
items.description: Host Docker group ID so the container can access the socket.

items.name: docker_container_name_regexp
items.title: Docker Container Regex
items.description: Regular expression used to match the Docker container whose logs should be parsed.

items.name: docker_log_type
items.title: Docker Log Type
items.description: Parser type label for the Docker datasource.

items.name: traefik_network_enabled
items.title: Shared Traefik Network
items.description: Attach CrowdSec to an existing Docker network shared with Traefik or other bouncers.

items.name: traefik_network
items.title: Traefik Network
items.description: Docker network shared with Traefik or other remediation components.

items.name: traefik_network_external
items.title: External Network
items.description: Use an existing external Docker network for shared access.

items.name: traefik_accesslog_enabled
items.title: Traefik Access Log
items.description: Read Traefik access logs from a mounted host path.

items.name: traefik_accesslog_mount_path
items.title: Traefik Log Path
items.description: Host directory containing Traefik access logs.

items.name: traefik_accesslog_filename
items.title: Traefik Log File
items.description: Filename of the Traefik access log inside the mounted directory.

items.name: lapi_expose_enabled
items.title: Expose Local API
items.description: Publish CrowdSec Local API on the host.

items.name: lapi_bind_address
items.title: Local API Bind Address
items.description: Host address used for the Local API port binding.

items.name: lapi_port
items.title: Local API Port
items.description: Host port used for the Local API binding.

items.name: appsec_enabled
items.title: Enable AppSec
items.description: Enable CrowdSec AppSec listener for WAF-capable remediation components.

items.name: appsec_name
items.title: AppSec Name
items.description: Friendly name for the AppSec component.

items.name: appsec_path
items.title: AppSec Path
items.description: Request path handled by the AppSec listener.

items.name: appsec_expose_enabled
items.title: Expose AppSec
items.description: Publish the AppSec listener on the host.

items.name: appsec_bind_address
items.title: AppSec Bind Address
items.description: Host address used for the AppSec port binding.

items.name: appsec_port
items.title: AppSec Port
items.description: Host port used for the AppSec port binding.

items.name: console_enrollment_enabled
items.title: Console Enrollment
items.description: Enroll this CrowdSec instance into CrowdSec Console.

items.name: console_enrollment_name
items.title: Instance Name
items.description: Human-readable name shown in CrowdSec Console.

items.name: console_enrollment_tags
items.title: Enrollment Tags
items.description: Comma-separated tags assigned during console enrollment.

items.name: console_enrollment_key
items.title: Enrollment Key
items.description: Enrollment key generated by CrowdSec Console.

items.name: bouncer_traefik_key
items.title: Traefik Bouncer Key
items.description: Optional seed key for a Traefik bouncer or plugin.
